_description: Chart template presets for common data visualization scenarios. Use these as starting configurations.

executive-dashboard.description: Clean KPI dashboard charts for executive audiences
executive-dashboard.guidelines: Titles state the insight, not the topic. Use data labels on key values. Limit to 5 series max.

technical-report.description: Detailed technical charts for engineering and data teams
technical-report.guidelines: Include axis labels with units. Show error bars or confidence intervals where applicable. Use scatter for correlation.

marketing-report.description: Engaging charts for marketing and growth metrics
marketing-report.guidelines: Lead with the story. Use funnel for conversion flows. Area charts for growth trends. Bright, engaging colors.

financial-analysis.description: Conservative charts for financial data and reporting
financial-analysis.guidelines: Y-axis must start at 0 for bar/column. Use dual-axes for revenue vs margin. Conservative colors. Include currency units.

dark-dashboard.description: Dark-themed charts for monitoring dashboards and real-time data
dark-dashboard.guidelines: Luminous colors on dark background. Use area charts with transparency for layered metrics. Liquid for percentages.
